title: Construct Target Array With Multiple Sums
titleCn: 多次求和构造目标数组

testcases.input: target = [9,3,5] Output: true Explanation: Start with arr = [1, 1, 1] [1, 1, 1], sum = 3 choose index 1 [1, 3, 1], sum = 5 choose index 2 [1, 3, 5], sum = 9 choose index 0 [9, 3, 5] Done
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Start with arr = [1, 1, 1] [1, 1, 1], sum = 3 choose index 1 [1, 3, 1], sum = 5 choose index 2 [1, 3, 5], sum = 9 choose index 0 [9, 3, 5] Done

testcases.input: target = [1,1,1,2] Output: false Explanation: Impossible to create target array from [1,1,1,1].
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: Impossible to create target array from [1,1,1,1].
